content: Phase 1: Set up MongoDB models (Department, Station, Location, AssetType, Asset, User, Inspection, OrangeList, Notification)
Phase 1: Create core backend endpoints (inspection CRUD, orange list workflow, file upload, notifications)
Phase 1: Create POC test script to validate full flow
Phase 1: Run POC test and fix until passing
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Full backend implementation (all CRUD + SIG + scheduling)
Phase 2: Full frontend implementation (all pages + components)
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
